description: A patient informs the front desk that their insurance has changed.

nodes.task_description: Verify clinician access and patient identity.
Locate the patient's record and navigate to the insurance section.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the patient's current insurance information.

nodes.task_description: Inactivate the old insurance policy and add the new insurance carrier, plan, and member ID.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately enters the new policy information.

nodes.task_description: Set the new policy as the primary insurance for future billing.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the patient's coverage information.
